== Notes for [[Item:Q29770|Q29770]] ==

Founded Gobekli Tepe and started agriculture. Ancestor of the people with G2 haplogroup. He was the first alcoholic, becoming dependent on beer he made from his farmed wheat. He beat his wife. Essentially the original sin of civilization.
<p>Nonetheless he is worshipped. Seen as a kind of shadow of civilization.</p>
<p>His alcoholism is seen as a predecessor to the annihilative nature of capitalism.
<p>His rather anachronistically banal name of George both means Ge-urge or farmer (Earth worker) but also indicates a normality.
<p>His name should be translated into whatever the normal form of George is in the culture. So Yuri in Russian for example
<p>George had the power to "Earthbend" and till the soil with no effort, just by command. His alcoholic descendants were not so lucky
<p>Worshipping George means accepting this evil within you and within civilization, and pushing it towards good
<p>George died of delirium tremens after trying to get off alcohol to stop his cirrhosis and in his last words wished humanity be free of alcohol.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]

==Merge==

Founder of Gobeklitepe

agricultural god

alcoholic

Born on Monday [[Sagittarius 1]], 1 A.H. (January 2, 9999 BC)

First person to ever brew alcohol
[[Category:Pages]]
